title: My AI outputs got worse every week—until I made this weekly review workflow (now quality stays stable)
prompt: Create a high-CTR X/Twitter cover image in 16:9, modern neutral motion-illustration style. Topic: My AI outputs got worse every week—until I made this weekly review workflow (now quality stays stable). Core visual: one clear before-vs-after story with a strong focal subject. Style requirement: use tasteful animated/illustrated elements (neutral, not childish), with richer design layers and depth. Text density: medium; include 2-4 short hooks/labels (not long paragraphs), each concise and scannable. Use strong composition, clear visual hierarchy, and eye-catching focal contrast. Color constraints: avoid dark blue-purple geek style; prefer warm neutral / off-white / sage / soft coral accents. Quality constraints: no clutter, no watermark, no logo, no gibberish text artifacts, no UI screenshot overload. Goal: visually attractive at first glance while keeping the key message obvious.
